title: Tarrese
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tarrese''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Tarro]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Tililix]].

Tarrese was a language similar to [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although harder and using more vocalizations. It had a written form that uses mainly the same [[Aurebesh/Legends|alphabet]] as Basic, but adding some characters to represent sounds that are made by combining various Basic letters (Similar to letters like ''ch'', ''sh'' or ''ñ'').

Most Tarro were fluent in both Tarrese and Basic, although they were only literate in their own language.

{{Language-stub}}
